signIn.heading: Sign In
signIn.subtitle: Welcome back
signIn.emailSent: Check your email to confirm your account.

planStep.heading: Choose your plan
planStep.subtitle: Select how you want to get started
planStep.betaDescription: Full access during closed beta. Invite code required.
planStep.paidPlansNote: Paid plans will be available after the beta period.
planStep.earlyBirdNote: Beta users will get early-bird pricing.

accountStep.name: Full Name
accountStep.inviteCodeTooltip: Required during closed beta. Ask the team for your code.

confirmed.heading: Email Confirmed
confirmed.message: Your email has been successfully verified. You can close this tab and return to the previous one.

aside.tagline: Structured reasoning for teams that ship.

sidebar.noWorkspaces: No workspaces yet. Create one to get started.
sidebar.emptyState: Select or create a thread to get started
sidebar.deleteConfirmPrefix: Are you sure you want to delete
sidebar.bulkDeleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete these items? This action cannot be undone.
sidebar.emptyStructureHint: Create a thread or folder to start organizing your work.
sidebar.newWorkspaceHint: Workspaces help you keep different projects separate.
sidebar.noWorkspaceHintCta: Create a workspace or select one to start working.

referenceSearch.hint: Try a different node label or keyword.

select.label: Select
select.description: Select and drag nodes around the canvas.

pan.label: Pan
pan.description: Hold and drag to pan the viewport.

zoomIn.label: Zoom in
zoomIn.description: Click anywhere to zoom in toward that point. Hold Shift to zoom out instead.

zoomOut.label: Zoom out
zoomOut.description: Click anywhere to zoom out from that point. Hold Shift to zoom in instead.

addNode.label: Add node
addNode.description: Click anywhere on the canvas to drop a new node.

connect.label: Connect
connect.description: Click two nodes to wire them together.

delete.label: Delete
delete.description: Click a node or edge to remove it.

validPath.label: Mark valid
validPath.description: Tag clicked nodes as a valid path.

invalidPath.label: Mark invalid
invalidPath.description: Tag clicked nodes as an invalid path.

comment.label: Comment
comment.description: Click a node to open its comments panel.

crossReference.label: Cross-reference
crossReference.description: Drop a reference to a node from another canvas.

redo.label: Redo
redo.description: Replay the change you just undid.

loadError.title: Canvas backend unreachable
loadError.hint: Couldn't reach Supabase to load this canvas. Check that the local Supabase instance is running, then retry.

empty.title: Empty canvas
empty.hint: Press {key} and click anywhere to drop your first node
empty.contextHint: or right-click the canvas for more options

node.noComments: No comments yet. Start the conversation.

comments.emptyTitle: No comments on this canvas yet.

save.offlinePending: {count, plural, one {# change pending} other {# changes pending}}

shortcuts.title: Keyboard shortcuts
shortcuts.subtitle: Press a key to switch tools instantly.
shortcuts.footerHint: Shortcuts work even while this panel is open.

settings.title: Settings
settings.languageSaveFailed: Couldn't save language preference. Please try again.

profile.name: Full Name
profile.emailChangeRequested: Confirmation email sent to the new address.
profile.saveFailed: Failed to save. Please try again.
profile.emailChangeFailed: Failed to change email. Please try again.
profile.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address.

badges.architectUnlock: Build a canvas with 25 or more nodes.
badges.criticUnlock: Mark 25 paths as valid or invalid.
badges.nightOwlUnlock: Work past midnight for a week.
badges.marathonerUnlock: Stay active 30 days in a row.
badges.weaverUnlock: Mix valid and invalid paths on one canvas.

security.passwordBlurb: Rotate the secret used to sign in. The new one takes effect immediately on the next sign-in.
security.passwordSame: New password must differ from the current one
security.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters
security.dangerZoneBlurb: Destructive actions that cannot be undone. Read carefully before proceeding.
security.deleteAccountCaption: Erases all your workspaces, threads and canvases
security.deleteConfirm: Are you sure? This action cannot be undone. All your data will be permanently deleted.
security.updateFailed: Failed to update password. Please try again.
security.deleteFailed: Failed to delete account. Please try again.

appearance.themeBlurb: Pick a palette that matches how you think. Each one repaints the workspace from the canvas to the toolbar.
appearance.canvasBlurb: Pick the surface your ideas live on. From quiet paper to a charted grid.

editor.blurb: Tune how the canvas responds when you build.
editor.zoomBlurb: How close you start when opening any canvas.

plan.title: Your plan
plan.caption: Subscription
plan.blurb: Pick a tier that matches how you want to think with Uniscept.
plan.paidPlansNote: Paid plans will be available after the beta period.
plan.earlyBirdNote: Beta users will receive early-bird pricing.

notifications.title: Notify me about
notifications.mentionsDescription: When someone @mentions you in a comment.
notifications.commentsDescription: Replies and new comments on your nodes and canvases.
notifications.invitesDescription: When you are invited to a workspace or your role changes.
notifications.digestDescription: A Monday summary of activity across your workspaces.

hero.title: Thought is
hero.subtitle1: Every Slack thread is a graveyard of ideas.

product.title: This is a reasoning engine.
product.subtitle1: Not Notion. Not a chatbot. Not a wiki.

structured.title: Structured reasoning
structured.description: Break down complex problems into nodes and logical connections. Make implicit reasoning explicit. See the architecture of your thinking.

validation.title: Path validation
validation.description: Mark reasoning paths as valid or invalid. Track what works. Build on truth.

references.title: Cross-references
references.description: Link canvases without duplication. Reuse conclusions. Let knowledge compound.

collaboration.title: Team collaboration
collaboration.description: Role-based access. Contextual comments. Real-time updates. Think together, decide faster, build stronger.

founders.title: Founders
founders.description: Make better decisions. Document your reasoning. Stop rehashing the same arguments every quarter.

researchers.title: Researchers
researchers.description: Map literature. Build frameworks. Turn papers into structured knowledge graphs that actually make sense.

engineers.title: Engineers
engineers.description: Design systems. Debug logic. Document architectural decisions that actually matter and won't be lost.

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Simple. Transparent. Fair.
pricing.footer: Try free with Demo mode. No credit card required.

cta.subtitle: Join researchers, founders, and engineers who actually ship.
